Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Technology_Innovation.asp

# Technology Innovation Route to Commercialization

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
For high-tech innovation, SBIR/STTR, prototype/testing, pitch, licensing, or commercialization questions, route to Technology Commercialization and maintain guardrails around patents, grants, valuation, and technical feasibility.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
